prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3475、2026年计划缩招7.5%（位次数字应减小）、学校排名上升及抖音热度升温（吸引力增强）、本省考生小幅增加（竞 争略加剧）等多重因素，缩招效应略大于竞争加剧效应，预计最低位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约3349名，区间2849–3849名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11472 → 3701 → 2869 → 3475. Since 2023, the ranking has significantly moved forward and then stabilized, fluctuating within the 2869–3475 range in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3475th place.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 36 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 40 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 37, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places in ranking), but no significant negative signals for this university were found in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranks 21st overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines leading nationally, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with social heat; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is approximately 66,000, a slight increase from 2025 (65,897), with physics category examinees estimated at about 44,500, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3475, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 7.5% (ranking number should decrease), the university's rising ranking and Douyin popularity increase (enhanced attractiveness), and a slight increase in provincial examinees (slightly intensified competition), the reduction effect slightly outweighs the competition intensification effect. The minimum ranking is expected to move forward slightly compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3349, with a range of 2849–3849.
